programs.title: Farishtay
programs.desc: Young woman Gayatri is devastated when her husband Arjun is brutally killed. She's even more horrified when she learns that her beloved brothers, Veeru and Dheeru who helped her get married to Arjun, work for a man who killed him.

programs.title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
programs.desc: The story revolves around the lives of four guys named Gopal, Lucky, Madhav, and Laxman who all absurdly fall for the same girl. Hence, begins the hilarious race to win her heart.

programs.title: Jab We Met
programs.desc: The life of a suicidal industrialist takes a sharp turn when he meets a spirited chatterbox on a train journey in this breezy Bollywood romantic comedy.
